'''Kaerobani''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who led the [[Lumini pirates/Legends|Lumini Pirates]]. Operating out of [[Rathalay]], he was known for his obsession over acquiring rare objects for his private collection. Around [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], Kaerobani's [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] attacked a New Republic [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] in a bid to acquire an ancient [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Holocron/Legends|Holocron]] that was on board. After killing much of the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] crew, the pirates succeeded in stealing the Holocron, and brought it back to Kaerobani's base. The Holocron was eventually recovered by Jedi [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]].

==Biography==
Kaerobani was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who became a renowned [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] [[Crime lord/Legends|kingpin]] by [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Obsessed with recovering rare artifacts for his private collection, Kaerobani owned a number of artifacts ranging from the helmet of a [[Phase II Dark Trooper/Legends|Phase II dark trooper]] to the cranial unit of the infamous [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]] [[8t88/Legends|8t88]]. At some point by 10 ABY, Kaerobani had become the leader of the [[Lumini pirates/Legends|Lumini Pirates]] and had gained the servitude of a number of [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]]. They set base on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Rathalay]] where they took residence in a massive fortress that was complete with [[Hangar/Legends|hangars]], [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]], and market areas. The fortress had a number of common areas as well as a trophy room where Kaerobani stored his various treasures.

His [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] attacked a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] serving with the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|Combined Defense Forces of the New Republic]], utilizing a captured [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] in order to hold it and steal its cargo, which included an important [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Holocron/Legends|Holocron]]. [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] was a part of the crew and repelled the pirates. The Holocron, however, had already been taken and Jade had to "board" a cargo crate in order to retrieve it. She infiltrated [[Kaerobani's base]], reclaimed the Holocron, and escaped.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Kaerobani.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Kaerobani only physically appears in ''Mysteries of the Sith''{{'s}} manual and multiplayer mode]]
Kaerobani is named after the word "Caribbean".<ref name="Blog">{{Blog|RyanKaufman|4|Kyle and Mara: Making Mysteries of the Sith - Part II: Zombies of the Dark Side}}</ref>

Kaerobani is mentioned in the plot and in the game's manual. However his model only appears as a multiplayer character.

In an unpublished story by [[Daniel Wallace]], a now-reformed Kaerobani was to have befriended retired [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Octavian Grant|Grant]]. When the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] attacked Rathalay, Kaerobani's 8t88 head would have aided Grant in defending the planet.<ref name="TFN">{{JCFCite|url=posts/24396345|board=Literature|thread=New Essential Guide to Droids|user=[[Daniel Wallace|Dan Wallace]]|date=2006-07-17|time=2:36 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20180409082841/http://boards.theforce.net/threads/new-essential-guide-to-droids.21671810/page-13}}</ref>
